# Ivan Magda

> Personal blog about AI agents and software development by Ivan Magda.

## About

- [About](https://ivanmagda.dev/about/): Background, projects, and contact info

## Blog Series: Building a Coding Agent in Swift

A 9-part series documenting a Swift reimplementation of a Claude Code-style CLI agent.

- [Part 0: Bootstrapping the Project](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/s00-bootstrapping-the-project/): Setting up a two-target SPM package, strict concurrency, and AsyncHTTPClient
- [Part 1: The Agent Loop](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/s01-the-agent-loop/): The agent loop that drives everything — how a single stopReason check turns an API client into an autonomous agent
- [Part 2: Tool Dispatch](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/s02-tool-dispatch/): Dictionary-based tool dispatch, path sandboxing, and file tools
- [Part 3: Self-Managed Task Tracking](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/s03-self-managed-task-tracking/): A Codable todo system with validation constraints and nag reminders
- [Part 4: Subagents](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/s04-subagents/): Context isolation through recursive agent loops with restricted tool sets
- [Part 5: Skill Loading](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/s05-skill-loading/): Two-layer knowledge injection — system prompt awareness and on-demand tool results
- [Part 6: Context Compaction](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/s06-context-compaction/): Three-layer compression strategy for infinite conversations
- [Part 7: Task System](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/s07-task-system/): A file-based task DAG with dependency resolution
- [Part 8: Background Tasks](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/s08-background-tasks/): Swift actors for background execution with notification injection

## Standalone Posts

- [Fixing the 40k CLAUDE.md Warning in a Monorepo](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/fixing-40k-claude-md-warning-monorepo/): How we restructured Claude Code's CLAUDE.md files in a monorepo to cut 73% of always-loaded context without losing a single fact
- [Five Things I Learned About Making AI Coding Agents Actually Work](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/five-things-ai-coding-agents-actually-work/): The biggest gains in AI agent performance come from the system around the model, not the model itself
- [Trust is the wrong question for AI coding agents](https://ivanmagda.dev/posts/trust-is-the-wrong-question-for-ai-coding-agents/): AI coding agents don't need trust — they need a verification loop, explicit invariants, and a work system designed around them

## Optional

- [Source Code](https://github.com/ivan-magda/swift-claude-code): The swift-claude-code GitHub repository
